name: Pasta Sauce Raphael
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the artichoke hearts and reserve the marinade.
2. Heat olive oil in a large saucepan.
3. Add onions, garlic, oregano, basil, black pepper, salt, red pepper flakes, and reserved marinage to the saucepan.
4. Sauté over medium-low heat until onions and garlic are soft and translucent, about 10 minutes.
5. Add tomatoes and simmer for 30 minutes.
6. Stir in artichoke hearts, Parmesan cheese, and parsley.
7. Simmer another 5 minutes before serving.
